scenes.title: The Farm
scenes.background_prompt: A pastoral farm scene with a large red barn in the background, a green field with a wooden fence, a mud puddle near the barn, and a dirt path. Sunny day with a few clouds. No people, no animals, no vehicles.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A sunny pastoral farm scene. A large red barn with white trim and a weathervane stands in the background, its double doors slightly open. A black and white cow with a brass bell around its neck grazes peacefully in the green field to the left, pulling at the tall grass. A pink pig with a curly tail rests contentedly near a brown mud puddle in front of the barn, its snout resting on the ground. A small brown chicken with a red comb walks near the pig, pecking at seeds on the ground. A green tractor with large black tires is parked beside the barn to the right, its engine off. A wooden fence runs along the edge of the field. The sky is bright blue with a few wispy clouds, and wildflowers dot the edges of the dirt path leading to the barn.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place cow in the green field (left), grazing and pulling at tall grass, wearing a brass bell. Place pig near the mud puddle in front of the barn, resting with snout on the ground. Place chicken near the pig, walking and pecking at seeds. Place tractor beside the barn (right), parked with engine off.
scenes.scene_description: In the bottom left foreground, rounded green bushes sit next to a light brown dirt path that stretches horizontally across the entire width of the scene. Below the path, the green grass is dotted with small white and pink flowers and green clovers, with more rounded green bushes on the bottom right. Behind the path on the left, a wooden fence with brown posts and rails runs horizontally. In the green field behind this fence, a black and white cow with a pink udder and a yellow bell around its neck stands facing right, grazing on the grass. A large tree with a thick brown trunk and rounded green foliage stands to the left of the cow, while a small green bush sits in front of the cow's legs. A dirt path curves from the foreground towards the center-right, where a brown chicken with a red comb and wattle is positioned, leaning forward to peck at the ground. To the right of the chicken, a pink pig with a curly tail and a smiling expression lies on its belly in a dark brown mud puddle. Behind the pig, another section of the wooden fence continues horizontally. To the right of the mud puddle, a green tractor with large yellow wheels, a brown seat, and a black exhaust pipe is parked facing left. Behind the tractor and the mud puddle stands a large red barn with a yellow-orange roof. The barn features a hayloft window with yellow hay, several small square windows on its side, and a black weather vane shaped like a rooster on its peak. A small green tree stands to the left of the barn, and a large tree with a thick brown trunk and green leaves frames the scene on the far right. In the background, rolling green hills and light blue mountains stretch across the horizon under a light blue sky filled with large, fluffy white and light purple clouds, indicating a bright, sunny day.

green tractor parked by the barn
